untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparative analysis of rolling profit metrics (30-day average vs 10-day average profit compression) and edge metric degradation over time. These are not available in the allowed indicator set. Specifically: (1) 'Strategy has been generating above-average returns for 30+ days' requires custom profit window comparison logic not expressible with single left/right conditions; (2) 'Observe measurable decline in edge metrics' requires tracking strategy-specific edge metrics not in allowed indicators; (3) 'profit_compression_threshold_percentile' and compression detection require multi-window rolling calculations beyond basic indicator comparisons; (4) Position size reduction logic (30-40%) cannot be expressed as entry/exit conditions. This signal requires custom regime detection logic or strategy-level tracking beyond microstructure price-action indicators.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_1_1 is a meta-strategy adaptation rule rather than a price-action trading signal. It describes competitive erosion of profitable strategies over time, which requires backtester support for: (a) tracking absolute returns over rolling windows, (b) detecting statistical compression in returns distribution, and (c) dynamically adjusting position sizing based on performance degradation. Standard OHLCV indicators cannot capture this regime. Recommend implementing as a separate portfolio management rule or custom performance monitoring module outside the standard rule engine.
